title: IntakeManifest
description: Manifest for one per-house intake bundle under data/pdfs/incoming/<house_key>/. v1.0 bundles (PDF-only, no quality data) remain valid; v2.0 adds ingestion-pipeline provenance and per-page quality so the dataset is reproducible from the recorded thresholds and pipeline version.

schema_version.description: v1.0 = R1 PDF-only intake. v2.0 = adds source_type, submitter (form only), consent (form only), pages[], pipeline{}.

consolidated_pdf.description: Filename of the rectified, consolidated PDF in the bundle root. Single source = passthrough; multi-source = pypdf-merged. Null only when the bundle is pending (no PDF yet).

source_filenames.description: Original filenames preserved under source/ (post-dedup by SHA-256).

state.description: Derived from the on-disk facts at write time: pending = no consolidated PDF yet; partial = consolidated PDF present, no scenes; extracted = at least one scene cut into data/dataset/<key>/.

source_type.description: v2.0+. Which adapter produced this bundle. 'batch' = developer-collected files; 'scrape' = web-scraped (gates flag but do not block); 'form' = customer submission (gates re-prompt the submitter, PII flag set).

submitter.description: v2.0, form only. Captured from the customer-facing submission form.

client_ip_hash.description: SHA-256 of the client IP. Never store the raw IP.

consent.description: v2.0, form only. The license + training-use consent the submitter ticked.

pages.description: v2.0+. Per-page quality + decision. One entry per page in the consolidated PDF; order matches page numbering (1-indexed).

source_origin.description: Which input file + (for multi-page sources) which page within it produced this page of the consolidated PDF.

rectified.description: Whether the rectifier successfully applied a perspective correction to this page.

human_qa_required.description: True when decision != pass — flagged for human review before training use.

thresholds_profile.description: Name of the thresholds profile applied (e.g. 'default', 'strict-form').

rectify_method.description: Default method attempted on each page. Per-page actual method recorded in pages[].rectify_method.

applied_to_text.description: Hard-constraint guard. MUST be false on pages containing dimension text/digits — generative enhancers hallucinate values.
